WD Named to 2026 S&P Dow Jones Best in Class Index North America.
Learn More
.
Details & Exclusions
Details & Exclusions
Free 2-day shipping all orders placed now through July 13, 2025. Free 2-day shipping applies to purchases delivered within the contiguous United States, excluding addresses in Hawaii, Alaska, Puerto Rico and other U.S. territories (other exclusions may apply). Western Digital reserves the right to change or discontinue these terms at any time without notice.
Details & Exclusions
Receive free 2-day shipping (UPS) on purchases $100 or more before taxes delivered within the contiguous United States, excluding addresses in Hawaii, Alaska, Puerto Rico and other U.S. territories. Products exclusions: Outlet Store products and recertified products. Retailers, Resellers and Distributors are excluded from this promotion. Western Digital reserves the right to change or discontinue these terms at any time without notice. This offer is valid on December 17th-18th, 2022.
Details & Exclusions
Offer Terms
Discount offer valid only for 10 or more
22TB Ultrastar DC HC570 (0F48155)
or 10 or more
20TB Ultrastar DC HC560 (0F38755)
, bought online through the Western Digital Store. This offer may not be combined, used in conjunction with or used in addition to any other promotion or offer, and does not apply to taxes or shipping costs. The offer is not applicable for any prior purchases and may not be available in all regions of the world. Delivery must be made within the contiguous United States, excluding addresses in Hawaii, Alaska, Puerto Rico and other U.S. territories. Western Digital reserves the right to change or discontinue this offer at any time without notice. Offer valid through December 30, 2022.

Western Digital My Cloud Home & Duo Firmware 9.9.0-102
WDC Tracking Number:
WDC-25007
Product Line/Web: My Cloud Home
Published:
December 15, 2025
Last Updated:
December 15, 2025
Description
My Cloud Home & Duo Firmware 9.9.0-102 includes updates to help improve the security of your My Cloud Home devices.
Product Impact
Minimum Fix Version
Last Updated
My Cloud Home
9.9.0-102
December 9, 2025
My Cloud Home Duo
9.9.0-102
December 9, 2025
For more information on the latest security updates, see the
release notes
. My Cloud Home, and My Cloud Home Duo devices will be automatically updated to reflect the latest firmware version.
Advisory Summary
Updated open-source OpenSSH package to version 8.4p1-5deb11u5 to resolve CVE-2025-26465 which could allow an active machine-in-the-middle attack on the OpenSSH client when the VerifyHostKeyDNS option is enabled.
CVE Number:
CVE-2025-26465
